tagline: Supervisor Agent is now available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled and HIPAA, FedRAMP Moderate, PCI DSS, or HITRUST controls selected.
what_it_does: Supervisor Agent is now available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled and HIPAA, FedRAMP Moderate, PCI DSS, or HITRUST controls selected. Use Supervisor Agent to create a multi agent supervisor system that orchestrates AI agents and tools to work together on complex tasks. This page describes how to use Supervisor Agent to create a multi agent supervisor system that orchestrates AI agents and tools to work together on complex tasks.
why_it_matters: You can improve their coordination based on natural language feedback from your subject matter experts.
